arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers ‘pressing’ in move for forward – Player likely to depart club this month
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers are well in contention to earn promotion to the Premier League. They are seventh in the Championship – only one point behind sixth-placed West Bromwich Albion and the play-off places.
